curation_notes: The patch commit (ffeff7c) replaces an unsafe mem::replace/mem::uninitialized block in the MultiDecoder Read impl with the sound take_mut crate. Only src/gzip.rs contained the actual vulnerability fix; Cargo.toml and src/lib.rs changes were just adding the take_mut dependency. Location derived from the patch diff: the read() method in the io::Read impl for MultiDecoder in src/gzip.rs.
